zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
SOL当前围绕80美元窄幅震荡，整体维持高位整理结构，短线回调幅度有限，多空力量趋于平衡，上方81附近承压。

技术指标方面，MACD保持正值1.25，动能仍偏多，但RSI缺失限制判断；价格运行于SMA20上方，均线提供动态支撑。

支撑位关注79.2均线及79关口，若失守或回踩78区间；阻力位在81.0-81.5区域，突破后有望挑战83上方。

交易策略建议以区间思路为主，未突破前高宜高抛低吸，若放量突破81.5可顺势轻仓追多，严格设置止损。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently in a short-term consolidation phase after a mild 24-hour decline of 0.45%. Price action remains tightly compressed between 80.36 and 81.03, indicating reduced volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the minor pullback, the broader structure still appears neutral-to-slightly bullish as price holds above the 20-day SMA near 79.20, suggesting underlying demand is still intact.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but cautiously constructive picture. The MACD reading at 1.25528 remains positive, implying underlying upward momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI is unavailable, restricting overbought/oversold assessment. However, sustained positioning above the SMA(20) suggests that medium-term trend bias has not yet shifted decisively bearish. Short-term momentum remains fragile and dependent on breakout confirmation.

Immediate support is identified at 80.36, followed by stronger structural support near the SMA(20) at 79.20. A break below this zone could expose downside toward 78.00. On the upside, resistance is established at 81.03, with a breakout potentially opening a move toward 82.50–83.00. The current narrow range reflects indecision, often preceding a volatility expansion phase in either direction. Volume confirmation will be key to validating any directional breakout attempt.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies may be more effective in the short term, favoring buy-the-dip approaches near support and partial profit-taking into resistance. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 81.03 or below 79.20 to validate direction. Risk management remains essential given compressed volatility, with tight stops recommended due to potential sharp expansion moves. Market conditions favor patience until range breakout is clearly established.
